en: Your Grace, this is not a request.
It is a request, Cousin Lancel. You are asking me for something I'm refusing.
Are you sure you want to refuse him?
He promised me I could stay in the Red Keep until my trial.
ko: 그는 제가 재판까지 레드 킵에 있을 수 있다고 약속했습니다.

en: He made no such promises. If you refuse to come of your own free will- Get out.
Order your man to step aside or there will be violence.
ko: 당신의 사람에게 비키라고 명령하세요, 그렇지 않으면 폭력이 일어날 것입니다.
